summary: Provision AWS App Runner to run a container image as a fully-managed web service, with no cluster or load balancer to operate. Creating a service is an engineer-gated form — it's a public-facing compute surface by default, so nothing here is blind self-service.

operations.title: Create a new App Runner service
operations.summary: Request a new App Runner service that runs a container image. An engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it's applied.
operations.description: Specify a new aws_apprunner_service that deploys from a container image in ECR: the image, its port, and the instance size. Deploying from a connected source-code repository (GitHub/Bitbucket) instead is a separate, engineer-authored path. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish.

params.name: image_identifier
params.label: Container image
params.help: The ECR image URI including tag or digest, e.g. <account>.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/repo:tag or public.ecr.aws/…

params.name: image_repository_type
params.label: Image repository type
params.help: ECR is a private repository in this account; ECR_PUBLIC is a public Amazon ECR Public Gallery image.

params.name: port
params.label: Container port
params.help: The port the container listens on.

params.name: auto_deployments_enabled
params.label: Auto-deploy on new image push
params.help: On redeploys automatically whenever a new image is pushed to this repository/tag.

params.name: cpu
params.label: CPU
params.help: Not every CPU/memory pairing is valid — App Runner rejects an unsupported combination at apply time.

params.name: memory
params.label: Memory
params.help: Must be a combination the chosen CPU size supports.

params.name: is_publicly_accessible
params.label: Publicly accessible
params.help: Off makes this service reachable only through a VPC ingress connection, configured as an engineer follow-up.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Service name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this service runs
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this service.

decisions: Deploying from a source-code repository (code_repository + an aws_apprunner_connection) instead of a container image is a separate, engineer-authored path — this form covers the common container-image deploy
Private ECR repository access (authentication_configuration.access_role_arn) is an engineer follow-up when image_repository_type is ECR and the repository isn't public
VPC egress (reaching private resources through an aws_apprunner_vpc_connector), a custom health check, and encryption_configuration (a customer-managed KMS key) are engineer decisions after creation
Auto Scaling configuration and observability configuration keep App Runner's account defaults; attach custom ones as an engineer follow-up
